finding: DIMO kPa stored raw in tire_pressure_* without /100 conversion; chassisTireSystemIsWarningOn not ingested

finding: HM normalizes to bar via kilopascalToBar; writes hm_signal_group_states not vehicle_latest_states
recommendation: Mirror HM bar values or unify read path for wear model

finding: Only DIMO writes tire_pressure_fl/fr/rl/rr; 1/6 vehicles non-null on VPS probe

finding: computePressureFactor assumes bar; reads only vehicle_latest_states; minReadingsForActive=3
recommendation: Fix unit + consider HM for status-only not wear

finding: Source priority MIXED>DIMO>HM; HM ISSUE drives overallStatus; DIMO stale can force STALE
recommendation: Sound design; rental path must receive HM injection

finding: Controller injects hmTirePressure; full pressure context on intelligence API
recommendation: Keep as canonical API surface

finding: getSummary(vehicleId) WITHOUT hmTirePressure; source hm_oem when pressure.source!=NONE even for DIMO-only
recommendation: P0 wiring gap: pass HM context or split source label DIMO/HM/MIXED

finding: Low pressure critical via /niedrig|low|under|alert/i on warningHints; TPMS via /tpms|druck|pressure/i on alert.type
recommendation: Replace regex with structured TireAlertCode

finding: Uses latestMeasurementAt (tread) not pressure timestamp
recommendation: Add pressureFreshnessAt field to read model

finding: measured if any tread measurement exists even when displayMode=ESTIMATED
recommendation: Split wearEvidence vs pressureEvidence

finding: Blocks only tires.state=critical; same getVehicleHealth path as UI
recommendation: Align with target policy for estimated critical

finding: Downgrades CRITICAL to WARNING when displayMode!=MEASURED

finding: Emits TIRE_CRITICAL from rental module state not raw TireHealthSummary.alerts

finding: Primary summary/detail API; legacy tireWearAnalysis fallback for %; hmTirePressure in modal

finding: Uses rental health for accent when present; local % buckets if missing

finding: Summary+detail on tires category; displayMode pill

finding: Local TIRE_ACTION_PCT thresholds parallel to canonical status

finding: Tire module stubbed in tests; no pressure-specific mapping tests

finding: Separate path from TireHealth; tire_pressure_warning from HM statuses

finding: Hourly enqueue all ACTIVE setups; jobId hour-bucket dedupe; not in MONITORED_QUEUES

finding: Calls recalculate() which writes snapshots/events/data-points

finding: Daily prune tire_health_snapshots if retention>0

finding: 30s interval; feeds pressure to latest state
